name: work-os
description: Initialize and upgrade a local Work OS by installing local skills, manifests, branch-safe migration plans, and audit-ready operating structure.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize or upgrade a local Work OS with branch-safe setup and local skills.
interface.longDescription: A setup and upgrade plugin for Work OS. It exposes one public init skill that audits the target folder, proposes branch-safe setup or migration work, writes a version manifest, and installs local operational skills for prime, report, feedback, reflect, and audit.
defaultPrompt: Use Work OS init-os to set up this folder.
Use Work OS init-os to audit this folder before setup.
Use Work OS init-os to upgrade this Work OS.
Use Work OS init-os to overlay Work OS on this existing project.
